prevented_failure_purpose: Localize a visible engineering-simulation fault only when current physical boundaries, topology, mappings, residuals, assumptions, and evidence depth support that localization.

physical_or_evidence_boundary.description: Current visible symptom and failure evidence
physical_or_evidence_boundary.authority_source: project symptom report and native diagnostic artifacts

physical_or_evidence_boundary.description: Current physical boundary, units, topology, and subsystem inventory
physical_or_evidence_boundary.authority_source: model-understanding preflight and target model structure

physical_or_evidence_boundary.description: Current signal, parameter, dataset, and mapping inventory
physical_or_evidence_boundary.authority_source: project evidence registry and target-owned mappings

physical_or_evidence_boundary.description: Current validation, assumptions, scenario, and claim-scope inventory

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against symptom or residual mislocalized
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: the visible symptom, failing subsystem, or residual source is not supported by current native evidence
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against physical boundary or topology violation
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: units, signs, balances, connectivity, or declared physical boundaries are inconsistent
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against signal or parameter mapping is wrong

prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against validation evidence is too shallow
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: the available object, signal, parameter, scenario, or time universe is not adequately evaluated
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against assumption or claim scope is overreached
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: an unresolved assumption, access gap, or bounded result is promoted beyond the checked scope
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

claim_boundary: This guard-model proof blocks only candidate admission when declared target-native obligation evidence is missing or native-failed. It does not independently detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, workflow, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
